usage: create_parasitic_coordinate_transform [-help] { -inst <string> [-x_offset <float>] [-y_offset <float>] [-orient {R0 R90 R180 R270 MY MX90 MX MY90}] [-x_block_origin <float>] [-y_block_origin <float>] [-relative_to_parent ]} | { -reset  }

options.name: -orient
options.description: {R0 R90 R180 R270 MY MX90 MX MY90} instance orientation valid options

options.name: -relative_to_parent
options.description: Instance transformation is provided with respect to immediate parent

options.name: -x_block_origin
options.description: In case of non-origin block, offset x coordinate in microns

options.name: -y_block_origin
options.description: In case of non-origin block, offset y coordinate in microns
